headline: Brown U Shooter BUSTED 👮‍♂️🔫 - Ivy League BLOOD 🩸💥
text:
Brown University 🏫📚 got STRAIGHT CAPT 💥🔫'd on Saturday 😱🚨 - TWO STUDENTS 🧑‍🎓🧑‍🎓 DROPPED DEAD ☠️💀 and NINE OTHERS BLEEDING OUT 🩸😵 in Providence, Rhode Island 🗺️🌊! Gunman 👤🔫 went FULL RAGE MODE 🤬💨 in Holley Engineering classroom 🖥️🏢 at 4PM 🕔 POP POP BANGS 🫢📈 leaving Ivy League brains 🧠📚 SPILLED like bad kegger 🍻🤮! PERSON OF INTEREST 🕵️‍♂️🚔 in his 20s DETAINED 😤🔒 at Coventry hotel 🏨🛏️ thx to Providence PD tip-off 💡👮 - FBI's Kash Patel 🦅🇺🇸 spilling X tea ☕📱: 'WE GOT HIM EARLY AM ⏰🚀!' No other suspects 🤷‍♂️✅, Chief Oscar Perez 📢 saying prosecutors feasting on evidence 🥩🔍 like MTG on conspiracy Qs 🐸🔥!

Mayor Brett Smiley 😷👨‍💼 met fams at hospital 🏥❤️, 'OVERWHELMED by their BALLER COURAGE 🏋️‍♂️💪 and HOPE ✨🙏!' Seven injured STABLE 🟢😌, one CRIT but chillin' ❄️, one HOME FREE 🏠🎉. Prez Trump 🍊👑 at White House WH: 'TERRIBLE THING 😢🇺🇸!' Brown Boss Christina Paxson 👩‍🎓📜 'DEEPLY MOVED 😭💔' - 2K students RELO'd to safe cribs 🛏️🏠 thx to locals opening DOORS 🚪👯‍♂️ like underground railroad vibes 🛤️✊. Fam support ON POINT 🤝❤️: 'No words for losing a kid 🧒💔 but we SLAYIN' comfort game!'

Campus LOCKDOWN 🔒🚫 still poppin' in spots 🕵️‍♀️🔎, vigil TONIGHT 🕯️🌙 for community HUGS 🤗😢. CCTV dropped BLACK-CLAD ghost 👻🖤 walkin' away 🚶‍♂️💨 - NO GAT FOUND in sweep 🧹🔫 tho! Hundreds of cops + feds SWARMED Providence 🐝🚓 like Trump rally chaos 🥳🇺🇸. Gun Violence Archive 📊🔫 clockin' 389 MASS SHOOTINGS this year 😤💥 - 4+ victims NO shooter count 🤡📈, USA's wild west VIBES 🤠🔫 on Ivy turf 🏫🍃! Shelter order LIFTED 🆓✅, but Brown fam GRIEVING HARD 😩🖤 - RIP angels, stay strapped? Nah, PRAY UP 🙏🛡️!
